rulings.Case Title: BECK & BLOOM, LLC VS. HAWK LOU ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, November 01, 2016 line 1. DEFENDANT HAWK LOU, KETTY LOU, THE HAWK LING LOU AND KETTY FONG LOU's MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT continued to December 1, 2016 for the moving party to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide courtesy copy of the operative complaint to department 501. Moving party shall also address the filing of the reply late without leave of court (under CCP 1005 reply was to be filed by October 3, 2016; reply filed on October 12, 2016, one day after the original hearing date). Declaration to be filed and served no later than November 18, 2016. Courtesy copies of the declaration and the operative complaint to be delivered to department 501 no later than November 22, 2016 with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CHRISTOPHER HARNEY VS. PAUL GYSEL ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant'S Jarico Reesce, John Law & Timothy Anderson'S Notice Of Motion And Motion For Summary Judgment; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, November 01, 2016 line 4. DEFENDANT JARICO REESCE, JOHN LAW, TIMOTHY ANDERSON Defendant'S Jarico Reesce, John Law & Timothy Anderson'S Notice Of Motion And Motion For Summary Judgment; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities DENIED. Triable issue of fact re: residential vs. commercial use of the property. (See Levy, Gysel, Reesce, Law and Anderson Declarations). = (501/REQ)
